title: UK Company Intelligence
description: Enriched business intelligence for a UK-registered company.

companyName.description: Registered company name as held by Companies House

status.description: Human-readable company status (e.g. Active, Dissolved, Liquidation)

type.description: Human-readable company type (e.g. Private limited company)

incorporationDate.description: Date of incorporation in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD)

registeredAddress.description: Full registered office address as a single string

accounts.description: Accounts status: overdue (boolean), nextDue, lastMadeUpTo dates

directors.description: Active officers: name, role, appointedOn, nationality, countryOfResidence

charges.description: Registered charges: chargeCode, status, createdOn, personsEntitled, description

website.description: Website enrichment: description, contactEmail, contactPhone, contactAddress, robotsAllowed

hiring.description: Hiring signals: source, activeListingCount, exampleTitles, techKeywords

lookedUpAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the lookup was performed
